creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
Samba 4.8 was EOLed on 2019-09-17, so you don't need to worry about it.

From other side, Samba 4.11 will depend, guess what, on ldb 1.6, which will flip the board again.

I'd rather stick the port to the original ldb package and let Samba and SSSD to coexist independently. That's the main reason, why ldb is now a bundled lib in Samba.
